requirement: Financial institutions must complete enhanced due diligence for all high-risk clients within 30 days of onboarding.
source_section: Section 2.1 - Enhanced Due Diligence for High-Risk Clients

requirement: Institutions must implement real-time transaction monitoring systems capable of flagging suspicious activity within 60 seconds.
Institutions must verify and record beneficial ownership for all corporate clients within 14 days.
Compliance teams must file suspicious activity reports within 24 hours of detection.
All compliance staff must complete AML certification training every 6 months.
